function Sum(a: seq<int>): int\n  decreases |a|\n{\n  if |a| == 0 then 0 else Sum(a[..|a|-1]) + a[|a|-1]\n}\n\nlemma SumAppend(s: seq<int>, x: int)\n  ensures Sum(s + [x]) == Sum(s) + x\n{\n  if |s| == 0 {\n    assert s + [x] == [x];\n  } else {\n    assert (s + [x])[..|s + [x]| - 1] == s;\n    assert (s + [x])[|s + [x]| - 1] == x;\n  }\n}\n\nghost predicate NoLoss(price: int, a: seq<int>)\n  requires |a| > 0\n{\n  price * |a| >= Sum(a)\n}\n\nghost predicate IsMinimalEqualPrice(price: int, a: seq<int>)\n  requires |a| > 0\n{\n  NoLoss(price, a) && !NoLoss(price - 1, a)\n}\n\nmethod EqualizePrice(a: seq<int>) returns (price: int)\n  requires |a| > 0\n  ensures IsMinimalEqualPrice(price, a)\n{\n  var s := 0;\n  var n := |a|;\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < n\n    invariant 0 <= i <= n\n    invariant s == Sum(a[..i])\n  {\n    assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];\n    SumAppend(a[..i], a[i]);\n    s := s + a[i];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert a[..n] == a;\n  // Now s == Sum(a)\n\n  price := (s + n - 1) / n;\n\n  // Prove IsMinimalEqualPrice(price, a)\n  var r := s % n;\n  assert s == (s / n) * n + r;\n\n  if r == 0 {\n    assert s + n - 1 == (s / n) * n + (n - 1);\n    assert 0
